title: Cryo Wiring Harness: Budgeted Hypervolume Search on a DTLZ2 Cost Surrogate
strategies: single centre layout (all vars 0.5): one middle trade-off on the sphere -> tiny hypervolume (baseline)
on-sphere random scatter: pin distance vars at 0.5, randomise angle vars -> beats the centre but clumps
on-sphere near-uniform grid incl. axis extremes: even tiling of the front -> large hypervolume with finite-grid headroom
collapse distance vars off 0.5 (g blows up): every cost exceeds the reference -> nothing counted -> hypervolume 0 (invalid)
